action.reasoning: Observation: I'm getting a RuntimeError about mismatched sizes when loading the model. This is likely because the PEFT model has different parameter shapes than the base model expects. I need to fix the model loading by adding ignore_mismatched_sizes=True to the from_pretrained call. Also, I need to complete the train.py file which was truncated.
